description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a human bust, featuring a detailed head and upper torso. The figure has a prominent bun at the back of the head, with facial features and a visible neck. The clothing appears to be a thick, rolled collar or scarf, draping naturally over the shoulders. The surface is uniformly colored in a matte blue, with visible textural variations and some roughness, suggesting a hand-sculpted or scanned appearance. The back of the bust is broad and rounded, with subtle indications of shoulder blades and upper back musculature. The overall form is solid and compact, with no visible openings or hollow sections.
description: A blue, textured bust of a person with a bun and a thick collar, featuring detailed facial and upper torso features. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with sculpted contours.
description_view_0: Right side view showing the bun, ear, and the rolled collar's contour.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the facial features, neck, and the symmetrical drape of the collar.
description_view_2: Left side view with the bun and ear visible, mirroring the right side but with slightly different collar folds.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the bun centered at the back of the head and the broad, rounded shoulders.
attribute_shoreline_boundary: There is no visible shoreline boundary; the object is a solid bust with no water features.
